title: The Census Act, 1948
full_text: The Census Act, 1948 जनगणना अधिनियम,1948 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 194837 Act Number: 37 Enactment Date: 1948-09-03 Act Year: 1948 Short Title: The Census Act, 1948 Hindi Title: जनगणना अधिनियम,1948 Long Title: An Act to provide for certain matters in connection with the taking of census. Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs Department: Department of Home Enforcement Date: 03-09-1948 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Census Act, 1948 Show all section Section 1. Short title and extent. Section 2. Definitions. Show Related Subordinates Section 2A. Rule of construction respecting enactments not extending to Jammu and Kashmir. Section 3. Central Government to take census. Show Related Subordinates Section 4. Appointment of census staff. Show Related Subordinates Section 4A. Staff of every local authority to be made available for taking census. Section 5. Status of census authorities as public servants. Section 6. Discharge of duties of census-officers in certain cases. Section 7. Power to call upon certain persons to give assistance. Section 7A. Requisitioning premises, of vehicles, etc., for taking of a census. Show Related Subordinates Section 7B. Payment of compensation. Show Related Subordinates Section 7C. Power to obtain information. Show Related Subordinates Section 7D. Power of entry into and inspection of premises, etc. Show Related Subordinates Section 7E. Eviction from requisitioned premises. Show Related Subordinates Section 7F. Release of premises from requisition. Show Related Subordinates Section 7G. Delegation of functions of the Central Government with regard to requisitioning. Show Related Subordinates Section 7H. Penalty for contravention of any order regarding requisitioning. Section 8. Asking of questions and obligation to answer. Show Related Subordinates Section 9. Occupier to permit access and affixing of numbers. Section 10. Occupier or manager to fill up schedule. Section 11. Penalties. Show Related Subordinates Section 12. Sanction required for prosecutions. Section 13. Operation of other laws not barred. Section 13A. Certain offences to be cognizable and triable summarily. Section 14. Jurisdiction. Section 15. Records of census not open to inspection of admissible in evidence. Section 15A. Protection of service interests of members of census staff. Section 15B. Protection of action taken in good faith. Section 16. Temporary suspension of other laws as to mode of taking census in municipalities. Section 17. Grant of statistical abstracts. Section 17A. Power to extend the provisions of Act to other operations. Show Related Subordinates Section 18. Power to make rules.
